# 3Programmers
## My Second Github
### By Ghazi

My choice of 3 programmers are 1.John Carmack Pioneer in 3D graphics and game programming (DOOM, Quake). 2.Bill Gates the Co-founder of Microsoft, which standardized personal computing software.Steve Wozniak Designed and built the Apple I and II computers.

![Picture of John Carmack](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/dc/John_Carmack_GDC_2010.jpg)

![Picture of Bill Gates](https://www.givingpledge.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/rdCzAHE_Gates_Bill_Headshot_500x500-1.jpg)

![Picture of Steve Wozniak](https://www.heinzawards.org/rails/active_--dd1bc6517f46aca6693f0d167e23eb8b1426ad54/Stephen-Wozniak-crop.jpg?content_type=image%2Fjpeg&disposition=inline%3B+filename%3D%22Stephen-Wozniak-crop.jpg%22%3B+filename%2A%3DUTF-8%27%27Stephen-Wozniak-crop.jpg)
